# VisuaLeaf — Visual Schema Designer Feature Matrix

| ID | Capability | Status | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| VIS-001 | Infinite canvas | **confirmed** | Drag collections from sidebar onto an infinite canvas | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-002 | Free positioning | **confirmed** | Manually drag and position collections anywhere on canvas | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-003 | Zoom and pan | **confirmed** | Standard canvas zoom in/out and pan navigation | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-004 | Auto-arrange | **confirmed** | Instant auto-layout organization of all collections on canvas | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-005 | Auto-generate from database | **confirmed** | Analyzes all existing collections and generates full diagram | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-006 | Intelligent relationship detection | **confirmed** | Graph theory–based algorithm detects collection relationships | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-007 | Color coding: 11 presets | **confirmed** | 11 color presets; applied via right-click "Change Color" context menu | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-008 | Custom layouts (manual positioning saved) | **confirmed** | Manual arrangement persisted as named custom layout | https://visualeaf.com/features/visual-schema/ |
| VIS-009 | Find Links: auto-detect to/from collection | **confirmed** | Automatically detect and create relationship lines to/from a selected collection | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-010 | Remove Links: all relationships | **confirmed** | Remove all relationship links from canvas | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-011 | Remove Links: per-collection | **confirmed** | Remove only relationship links for a selected collection | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-012 | Multi-selection on canvas | **confirmed** | Select multiple collections simultaneously on canvas | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-013 | Multi-selection: bulk color change | **confirmed** | Apply one color to all selected collections at once | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-014 | Multi-selection: bulk find links | **confirmed** | Find and draw links for all selected collections | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-015 | Multi-selection: bulk remove links | **confirmed** | Remove links for all selected collections | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-016 | Multi-selection: bulk delete from canvas | **confirmed** | Remove all selected collections from canvas (not from database) | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-017 | Export schema diagram | **confirmed** | Export canvas diagram to file (format not specified in docs) | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-018 | Import schema diagram | **confirmed** | Import previously exported diagram file | https://visualeaf.com/docs/schema-designer |
| VIS-019 | Plan requirement | **confirmed** | Visual Schema Designer requires Basic or Professional plan | https://visualeaf.com/features/visual-schema/ |
